highlights.headline: Phoenix Suns vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Phoenix Suns vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Phoenix Suns vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/21 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Devin Booker scored 27 points and Jalen Green added 12 points in his return to the lineup as the Phoenix Suns beat the Philadelphia 76ers 116-110 on Tuesday night in a matchup of teams playing the second game of a back to back.
headlines.shortLinkText: Booker scores 27, Green adds 12 in return to the Suns' lineup in a 116-110 win over 76ers

highlights.headline: LA Clippers vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights
highlights.description: LA Clippers vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (LA Clippers vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights) 2026/01/21 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Coby White scored 27 points and hit six of Chicago's franchise record-tying 25 3-pointers, and the hot-shooting Bulls beat the surging Los Angeles Clippers 138-110 on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: White scores 27 and Bulls match a franchise record with 25 3-pointers in 138-110 win over Clippers

headlines.description: — Alperen Sengun had 20 points, 13 rebounds and nine assists to help the Houston Rockets rally for a 111-106 victory over the San Antonio Spurs on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sengun just misses triple-double and powers Rockets' comeback win over Spurs

headlines.description: — Keyonte George scored a career-high 43 points, Jusuf Nurkic recorded his second career triple-double, and the Utah Jazz rallied to beat the Minnesota Timberwolves 127-122 on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: George scores 43 as Jazz rallies to beat Timberwolves 127-122, giving Hardy his 100th coaching win
